stemHtml: When crossing the North-Atlantic, a commercial jet aeroplane experiences a fuel leak. The pilots are forced to ditch the aircraft. Unless the aircraft flight or operations manual state otherwise, which of the following configurations is most appropriate?

options.a: Landing gear down and nose attitude down.
options.b: Landing gear up and nose attitude down.
options.c: Landing gear down and nose attitude up.
options.d: Landing gear up and nose attitude up.
